'''âth-ng-n-n''' ('''kathangnenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ewte|ewte]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-n-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ewte|ewte]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-ng-n-n
|-
! Lemma
| kathangnenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithangnenoko|thithangnenoko]] || [[word:jithangnenoko|jithangnenoko]] || [[word:shithangnenoko|shithangnenoko]] || [[word:kithangnenoko|kithangnenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothangnenoko|thothangnenoko]] || [[word:jothangnenoko|jothangnenoko]] || [[word:shothangnenoko|shothangnenoko]] || [[word:kothangnenoko|kothangnenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthangnenoko|thĂŠthangnenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠthangnenoko|jĂŠthangnenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠthangnenoko|shĂŠthangnenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠthangnenoko|kĂŠthangnenoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathangnenoko|thathangnenoko]] || [[word:jathangnenoko|jathangnenoko]] || [[word:shathangnenoko|shathangnenoko]] || [[word:kathangnenoko|kathangnenoko]]
|}
